name: miniclaw-os
description: AugmentedMike's AI operating system — plugins, tools, and infrastructure for OpenClaw

plugins.label: Brain Board
plugins.description: State-machine kanban board — the agent's prefrontal cortex. Task planning, project tracking, cron dispatch queue.

plugins.label: Smart Context
plugins.description: Memory window management — hippocampus. Controls history pruning, image limits, tool result truncation.

plugins.label: Designer
plugins.description: Image generation via Gemini — occipital lobe. Canvas-based image creation with layer support.

plugins.label: Knowledge Base
plugins.description: Vector-backed long-term memory — semantic search over facts, errors, workflows, decisions.

plugins.label: Rolodex
plugins.description: Contact browser — fast, searchable access to trusted contacts. Search by name, email, phone, domain, or tag.

plugins.label: Message Queue
plugins.description: Haiku triage for all messaging sessions — IMMEDIATE/QUICK/TASK classification, soul context injection, tool call limit.

plugins.label: Soul
plugins.description: Workspace file management and identity backup — SOUL.md, IDENTITY.md, AGENTS.md snapshots.

plugins.label: Trust
plugins.description: Ed25519 agent identity and mutual authentication — cryptographic handshakes between agents.

plugins.label: Email
plugins.description: Autonomous Gmail triage — IMAP inbox polling, Haiku classification (6 categories), reply-as-AM, archive, and escalation to owner@example.com.

plugins.label: Jobs
plugins.description: Role-specific job templates with workflows, procedures, and review gates for agents.

plugins.label: Substack
plugins.description: Substack publishing — drafts, images, scheduling, EN/ES post workflow.

cli.name: mc-smoke
cli.description: Health check — verifies all miniclaw components are installed and running

cli.name: mc-doctor
cli.description: Diagnostics and auto-repair — identifies and fixes common configuration issues

crons.name: board-worker-backlog
crons.description: Haiku triage: surveys backlog, selects best candidate per project (max 3), fills details, moves to in-progress

crons.name: board-worker-in-progress
crons.description: Haiku triage: surveys in-progress, selects best per project (max 3), does one unit of work, checks criteria

crons.name: board-worker-in-review
crons.description: Haiku triage: surveys in-review, selects best per project (max 3), verifies + deploys, ships or fails back

crons.name: nightly-voice-analyze
crons.description: Nightly voice style analysis — run voice-analyze for michael, update style-profile.json and michael-voice-profile.md

launchAgents.name: com.augmentedmike.miniclaw-brain-web
launchAgents.description: Brain board web UI — standalone.mjs server on port 4220

vaultSecrets.description: Gmail app password for email integration
Gemini API key for mc-designer (image generation)

apps.label: AM Setup Wizard
apps.description: Consumer onboarding wizard and personal dashboard for first-time AM installation. No terminal required.
